---
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "intro_method_skills/*.qmd"
    - "epss_training/*.qmd"
    - "intro_python/*.qmd"
    - "dl4sg_marcov/*.qmd"
    - 'energy_score/*.qmd'
    - 'quarto_website/*.qmd'
    - 'kigali_workshop/*.qmd'
    # - 'causal_inference/*.qmd'
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, author, date, categories]
  image-height: "150px"
page-layout: full
format: html
---
